author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Livelihood - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR

QUESTION AND ANSWERS ON RIGHT LIVELIHOOD
[Women's Order Convention 1987]
Contents
2Why are fewer people working in co-operative Right Livelihood?
6Should only Order members work in Right Livelihood businesses?
7Workers in a co-op being aware of the whole co-op
12Viable businesses for co-ops
15Women becoming dependant collectively on men collectively
21Becoming dependent on therapists
24What is 'working well'?
26Earning one's living by teaching the Dharma?
30" 'Charging' for the Dharma"
33Working 'under pressure'
